titles.title: Lord Help Me Run In the Race

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord help me run in the race, Help me not bring you disgrace, But let me rise on wings of faith, Until the day I’ll see your face.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes the way down here gets rough, When I look at Satan’s plans, It’s then I rise on wings of faith, For in God’s word I am safe.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now we can see the end is near, The coming of the Lord is nigh, Oh sinner where will you stand When the time down here will end?
